title: Amtech G0100 100mm (4") Pointing trowel
features: DURABLE: This 10mm (4") pointing trowel has a hardened and tempered steel blade with an attractive, lacquered finish wooden handle
STEEL BODY: Durable construction provides strength for long-term performance
SIZE CAPACITY: 4 inch / 10 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning Attention: Use protective goggles during use and avoid areas with power lines or gas underground. Box Contains 1 x 4" Pointing Trowel See more
